hero-h1: Wedding DJ in Chattanooga • Faith-Based Events
hero-tagline: Honoring Every Moment • Honoring All Heroes
service-card-1-text: Professional, faith-respectful wedding DJ services with clean music, structured timelines, and stress-free coordination.
service-card-2-text: Confident MC presence, clear communication, and modern music tailored to your values and your guests.
service-card-3-text: High-quality audio and tasteful lighting designed to enhance your event without overwhelming it.
service-card-4-text: Reliable, positive entertainment for corporate gatherings, churches, and community celebrations.
service-area-text: Valor Wave Entertainment proudly serves weddings and events throughout Southeast Tennessee, including Chattanooga and Cleveland, as well as Northwest Georgia communities such as Dalton, Ringgold, and Fort Oglethorpe. Travel outside these areas may be available upon request.
bio-text-1: Hello! My name is Sam Massengale, and I’ve proudly called Chattanooga home my entire life. I served over 12 years in the United States Army and hold a Master’s Degree from Belhaven University. I am blessed with a wonderful wife and four amazing boys.
bio-text-2: Alongside my wife, I decided it was time to turn our passion for music and singing into something special — and that’s how Valor Wave Entertainment was born. With over 12 years of DJ experience across weddings, corporate events, and community celebrations, I bring professionalism, creativity, and heart to every event.
bio-text-3: Guided by our loving Father and Jesus Christ, our mission is simple: to provide a worry-free, faith-based, unforgettable experience. We look forward to honoring every moment — and all heroes — while creating memories that last a lifetime.
wedding-dj-intro: Looking for a wedding DJ in Chattanooga who brings modern energy with faith-based values? Valor Wave Entertainment provides DJ + MC services, sound, and lighting for weddings and events across Southeast Tennessee and Northwest Georgia. We focus on clear communication, clean music options, and a smooth, stress-free experience from ceremony to last dance.
wedding-dj-card-1-text: Professional planning, timeline support, reliable equipment, and a confident MC—so your day stays on track.
wedding-dj-card-2-text: Chattanooga, Cleveland, Hixson, and nearby communities—plus Northwest GA including Ringgold, Fort Oglethorpe, and Dalton.
wedding-dj-card-3-text: We can tailor music to your preferences and venue guidelines while keeping the atmosphere fun and welcoming.
faq-1:
How far in advance should we book?
For peak wedding season, we recommend reaching out as early as possible to secure your date.
faq-2:
Do you travel outside Chattanooga?
Yes—Southeast Tennessee and Northwest Georgia are our core service areas, and extended travel is available upon request.
faq-3:
Can you keep music clean/family-friendly?
Absolutely. We can customize playlists to match your values and your guest list.
brand-meaning-heading: The Meaning Behind Valor Wave Entertainment
brand-meaning-1: Valor Wave Entertainment represents the powerful blend of honor, service, and celebration. Valor reflects courage, sacrifice, and respect for those who serve — our military, veterans, first responders, healthcare workers, educators, and everyday heroes in our communities.
brand-meaning-2: The word Wave symbolizes movement, energy, and the moments that bring people together. Just like a wave, music carries emotion, creates connection, and leaves a lasting impact long after the event ends.
brand-meaning-3: Together, Valor Wave Entertainment stands for honoring what matters most while creating unforgettable, joy-filled experiences — all delivered with professionalism, integrity, and faith-based values.
hero-discount-text-1: We proudly offer a Hero Discount for active-duty military, veterans, first responders, healthcare workers, and teachers. Mention it in your quote request and we’ll apply it to qualifying events.
hero-discount-text-2: Proof of service may be requested. Discount amount varies by package and date availability.
calendar-intro: View our availability and request your date. If you don’t see your date listed, submit a quote request and we’ll confirm promptly.
calendar-note: Note: For this calendar to display, the Valor Wave Entertainment Google Calendar must be shared publicly (or shared with anyone who has the link).
testimonial-form-permission: <input type="checkbox" name="permission" value="Yes" required> I give Valor Wave Entertainment permission to use my testimonial on the website.
testimonial-form-footer: Thank you—your feedback helps future couples and clients book with confidence.
testimonial-1-text: "Valor Wave Entertainment made our wedding absolutely perfect. Professional, faith-centered, and fun!"
testimonial-2-text: "Sam was incredible. From ceremony to reception, everything was smooth and stress-free."
testimonial-3-text: "Highly recommend for church and community events. Clean music and great energy."
footer-line-2: Faith-Based Wedding & Event DJ | Southeast TN & Northwest GA
